text: I feel curious and alert, wandering through spaces designed for reflection, learning, and innovation. The first scene offers a quiet, almost meditative atmosphere, inviting slow contemplation on comfort and modern emptiness. In the second, I sense excitement and anticipation surrounded by vivid colors and interactive displays; the air is charged with the promise of discovery and intellectual engagement—like standing at the threshold of new ideas, eager to see how humanity and technology might intertwine.
